description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & Publish docker image for PyNE-CI that triggers on push to docker/* and .github/workflows/docker_publish.yml. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for ubuntu versions 16.04 and 18.04. In each job, check out the repository, set up QEMU, log in to the GitHub Container registry, and then build and push multiple Docker images with different tags and build arguments.
